title: Agent Variant Configuration
description: Configuration for vendor-specific agent generation from core agent prompts

vendor.description: The target CLI vendor name (e.g., claude, codex, gemini)

destDir.description: The relative path to the directory where generated agent files will be saved

modelDefault.description: The default AI model to use for this vendor's agents

maxTurnsDefault.description: The default maximum number of turns allowed for agents

toolsDefault.description: The default set of tools (abstract or vendor-specific) for agents

protocolPath.description: The path to the vendor-specific execution protocol markdown file

agents.description: Map of agent-id to vendor-specific overrides for generated Markdown or TOML agent files
